data.description:
**Infosys Brasil**
está em busca de profissionais com o perfil de
**Data Engineer (AWS | Databricks | Python)**
para juntar-se ao nosso time.
  
  
**Qualificações Requeridas**

- Experiência sólida como Data Engineer.
- Domínio em Python e Spark SQL, com foco em desenvolvimento no ambiente Databricks.
- Conhecimento prático em serviços AWS, como: S3, EC2, Lambda, SQS, SNS, DynamoDB e OpenSearch.
- Experiência com bancos de dados relacionais e linguagem SQL para manipulação e análise de dados.
- Vivência com controle de versão utilizando GitHub.
- Experiência com automação de pipelines CI/CD, utilizando GitHub Actions ou ferramentas similares.
- Inglês avançado ou fluente para comunicação em ambiente global.

**Diferenciais (conhecimentos Desejáveis)**

- Experiência em projetos de engenharia de dados em ambientes cloud, especialmente AWS.
- Familiaridade com arquitetura de dados escalável e boas práticas de engenharia de dados.
- Conhecimento em processamento de dados em larga escala (big data).
- Experiência prévia em ambientes ágeis (Scrum/Kanban).
- Forte capacidade analítica e orientação a dados.

**Principais Atividades e Responsabilidades**

- Desenvolver, manter e otimizar pipelines de dados utilizando Python, Spark e SQL, com foco em ambientes Databricks.
- Atuar na construção e sustentação de soluções de engenharia de dados em ambiente AWS, garantindo alta disponibilidade e performance.
- Integrar diferentes fontes de dados, assegurando qualidade, governança e confiabilidade das informações.
- Automatizar processos de desenvolvimento e deploy por meio de pipelines de CI/CD.
- Colaborar com equipes multidisciplinares (dados, negócios e tecnologia) para entendimento de requisitos e entrega de soluções eficientes.
- Realizar code review e contribuir para a melhoria contínua das práticas de desenvolvimento.
- Monitorar e solucionar incidentes relacionados a dados e pipelines.

**Informações Adicionais**
**Tipo de trabalho**
: CLT (Trabalho em Tempo Integral), Horário flexível.
  
  
**Pacote de benefícios**
: Vale-transporte, vale-refeição, auxílio-creche, seguro de vida, auxílio-funeral, seguro médico e odontológico.
  
  
**Carreira**
: Trabalho global em clientes e/ou projetos nacionais e internacionais, com possibilidade de transferência internacional de carreira.
  
  
**About Us**
Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
  
  
**EEO**
Infosys provides equal employment opportunities to applicants and employees without regard to race; color; sex; gender identity; sexual orientation; religious practices and observances; national origin; pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions; status as a protected veteran or spouse/family member of a protected veteran; or disability.

data.description:
- Primary skills:Technology->Functional Testing->Mainframe testing->Proterm,Technology->Microsoft Technologies->PowerApps

A day in the life of an Infoscion
  
  

- As part of the Infosys consulting team, your primary role would be to lead the engagement effort of providing high-quality and value-adding consulting solutions to customers at different stages- from problem definition to diagnosis to solution design, development and deployment.
- You will review the proposals prepared by consultants, provide guidance, and analyze the solutions defined for the client business problems to identify any potential risks and issues.
- You will identify change Management requirements and propose a structured approach to client for managing the change using multiple communication mechanisms.
- You will also coach and create a vision for the team, provide subject matter training for your focus areas, motivate and inspire team members through effective and timely feedback and recognition for high performance.
- You would be a key contributor in unit-level and organizational initiatives with an objective of providing high-quality, value-adding consulting solutions to customers adhering to the guidelines and processes of the organization. If you think you fit right in to help our clients navigate their next in their digital transformation journey, this is the place for you!
- Good knowledge on software configuration management systems
- Strong business acumen, strategy and cross-industry thought leadership
- Awareness of latest technologies and Industry trends
- Logical thinking and problem solving skills along with an ability to collaborate
- Two or three industry domain knowledge
- Understanding of the financial processes for various types of projects and the various pricing models available
- Client Interfacing skills
- Knowledge of SDLC and agile methodologies
- Project and Team management

data.description:
**Infosys** is seeking a **Client Partner** for the **HiTech** vertical. The person will lead all client interfaces within the assigned account scope and, along with Senior Client Partners/Group Managers, build an account plan for client management. Typically, the Client Partner manages a single account or a portion of a large account with a P&L responsibility of $30MM to $50MM.  
  
**Infosys** is seeking a **Manager - Client Services** for the **HiTech** vertical. The person will lead all client interfaces within the assigned account scope and, along with Senior Client Partners/Group Managers, build an account plan for client management. Typically, the Manager - Client Services manages a single strategic account or a portion of a large account with a P&L responsibility of $30MM to $50MM.  
The role will focus on managing and expanding relationships with a leading global enterprise software and cloud platform client, driving growth across digital transformation, AI-led services, cloud, data, customer experience, engineering, and enterprise modernization opportunities.  
  
**Role Description:**  

- Client relationship management and business development: Manage client relationships, grow a portfolio of $30–50M, and own the opportunity lifecycle: Prospect Evaluate Propose Close.
- Strategic account growth: Build and expand trusted relationships across business, technology, procurement, and executive stakeholders within a large enterprise software/cloud platform account.
- AI-first and digital transformation selling: Identify and shape opportunities across AI, Generative AI, agentic AI, automation, data, cloud modernization, platform engineering, enterprise applications, and customer experience transformation.
- Client delivery assurance: Collaborate with delivery stakeholders to ensure all commitments to the client are met.
- Account planning and governance: Develop account plans detailing key relationships, opportunities, pricing strategies, and risk mitigation.
- Conduct market research, competitor analysis, client presentations, estimation efforts, proposals, and negotiations.
- Partner with Delivery Managers to resolve people or infrastructure issues impacting project delivery.
- Balance multiple projects for the client, coordinating across delivery managers, consulting teams, horizontal competency units, and global delivery teams.
- Drive revenues from go-to-market solutions sponsored by the business unit within the account scope, including AI-first services, cloud, data, cybersecurity, digital engineering, enterprise platforms, and cost optimization offerings.
- Work closely with Solutions Leaders to create customized solution pitches and ensure successful delivery and revenue realization.
- Build comprehensive account plans, including relationship mapping, opportunity pipeline, revenue forecasts, and risk assessment.
- Make pricing decisions within the scope of the Master Services Agreement.
- Provide pre-sales proposal support for new business development beyond the account scope.
- Offer input for future alliances with relevant product vendors.

  

- Act as a trusted advisor to the client by bringing proactive ideas around productivity improvement, AI-led transformation, operational efficiency, platform modernization, and differentiated customer/employee experiences.

  
**About Infosys HiTech Vertical:**

The Hi-Tech vertical at Infosys partners with global technology leaders to accelerate growth and deliver measurable business outcomes. We enable clients to strengthen market leadership through innovative solutions that drive revenue, optimize cost structures, improve productivity, and enhance customer and employee engagement.

Our expertise spans software, platforms, internet, enterprise software, cloud, and semiconductor domains, helping organizations scale digital transformation initiatives with agility. By leveraging advanced technologies such as AI, Generative AI, cloud, data analytics, automation, cybersecurity, and digital engineering, we empower Hi-Tech enterprises to unlock new revenue streams, improve operational efficiency, modernize platforms, and stay ahead in a highly competitive and fast-evolving marketplace.

Infosys’ AI-first offerings, including Infosys Topaz, and cloud capabilities through Infosys Cobalt, help enterprises move from experimentation to scalable business impact across operations, engineering, customer experience, and enterprise transformation. Infosys’ strategy also emphasizes responsible, secure, and enterprise-grade AI adoption at scale.

 **Required Qualifications:**  

- Bachelor’s degree or foreign equivalent required from an accredited institution. Will also consider three years of progressive experience in the specialty in lieu of every year of education and 11+ years of experience, with strong sales/relationship management/account management experience
- Significant business development and project management experience
- Experience in the relevant industry/vertical, preferably within HiTech, enterprise software, SaaS, cloud platforms, digital platforms, or technology services.
- Track record of interacting and building relationships with C-level client contacts
- Proven ability to grow strategic accounts through consultative selling, solution-led selling, and value-based commercial discussions.
- Hands-on experience with proposal creation and leading proposal presentations
- Strong leadership, interpersonal, communication, and presentation skills
- Wide variety of IT and business consulting engagement experience
- Experience selling or managing services across one or more of the following areas: AI, cloud, data, application modernization, enterprise platforms, digital engineering, customer experience, cybersecurity, or managed services.
- Ability to operate in a complex matrix environment, partnering with delivery, consulting, solution, legal, commercial, and alliance teams.
- Candidates authorized to work for any employer in the United States without employer-based visa sponsorship are welcome to apply. Infosys is unable to provide immigration sponsorship for this role at this time

  
**Preferred Qualifications:**  

- Knowledge of industry specific go-to-market solutions
- Good understanding of industry specific business issues and drivers
- Experience working with large enterprise software, SaaS, cloud, or platform-based clients.
- Understanding of how technology companies monetize platforms, ecosystems, products, and enterprise customer relationships.
- Global Delivery Model experience
- Experience managing large multi-location consulting engagement teams
- Track record as an Account Manager in a rapidly growing client relationship
- Experience driving growth in strategic accounts through AI, cloud, data, platform engineering, automation, or digital transformation services.
- Familiarity with hyperscaler ecosystems, enterprise SaaS platforms, partner alliances, and product-led technology environments.
- Ability to identify whitespace opportunities and shape proactive proposals around productivity, cost optimization, speed-to-market, customer experience, and platform modernization.

  
**Along with competitive pay, as a full-time Infosys employee you are also eligible for the following benefits:**  

- Medical/Dental/Vision/Life Insurance
- Long-term/Short-term Disability
- Health and Dependent Care Reimbursement Accounts
- Insurance (Accident, Critical Illness, Hospital Indemnity, Legal)
- 401(k) plan and contributions dependent on salary level
- Paid holidays plus Paid Time Off

data.job_title: Transformation Programme Manager - Financial Services & Insurance
data.description:
**About Us**

Where Innovation meets Excellence. Be a part of a globally renowned management consulting firm that is on the front-line of industry disruption. We are a mid-size player with a supportive, entrepreneurial spirit that works with a market-leading brand in every sector, while our parent organization Infosys is a top-5 powerhouse IT brand that is outperforming the market and experiencing rapid growth.

Our consulting business is annually recognized as one of the UK's top firms by the Financial Times and Forbes due to our client innovations, our cultural diversity and dedicated training and career paths we offer to our consultants. We are committed to fostering an inclusive work culture that inspires everyone to deliver their best.

**The Team**

Our Financial Services and Insurance practice supports some of the largest global firms and most recognizable local brands solve their biggest challenges in today's age of digital and AI led transformation. With diverse services, ranging from strategy and advisory to large scale implementations and change initiates, from business change to operational transformation and leading-edge IT solutions, we help clients shape and achieve their growth agenda for a sustainable future.

**About the role:**

Our mission is to drive innovation and transformation in the Financial Services industry. We help some of the largest global firms solve their biggest challenges and thus become a key part of the client's transformation journey. If you are looking for a challenging career working in a vibrant environment, this could be the role for you. As part of our global team, you will be working with cutting edge technologies and will have the opportunity to develop a wide range of new skills while working for some of the leading firms in the world.

We are seeking a Transformation Programme Manager / Programme Director who specializes in the Financial Services domain. This role is pivotal in leading large scale complex transformation initiatives in financial services, including Retail, Commercial, Payments, and Lending, as well as not-for-profit organizations.

**Key Responsibilities:**

·       Lead and manage large-scale transformation programmes, end to end delivery, aligning with both client goals and industry best practices.

·       Build and manage relationships with senior stakeholders and SMEs, influencing decision-making in line with business goals.

·       Create structure for large-scale transformation programmes, including programme target operating model and roadmaps, managing alignment across people, process, technology, and business objectives.

·       Orchestrate programmes across multiple entities as well as internal & external stakeholders (e.g. client teams, technology teams etc.)

·       Own, define and manage Programme Governance including plans, timelines, resource allocation, risk management, budget oversight and status reporting, ensuring programme deliverables adhere to the agreed governance and risk framework.

·       Implement effective change management strategies to promote adoption of new processes and technologies within client organizations.

·       Deep knowledge of scaled agile SAFe delivery, product management, and able to liaise between business and tech, define and prioritize technical requirements, create and maintain product backlog, epics, features, user-stories and drive agile delivery.

·       Lead PI Planning, big-room planning workshops, sprint planning, work closely with cross-functional multi-disciplinary teams.

·       Be the bridge between technical delivery team and business product owners and work closely with Business & Technology teams with an agile, iterative approach using design thinking to foster innovation.

·       Good understanding of latest technologies, regulatory developments, and best practices in Financial Services & Insurance space.

·       Support sales proposals, Request for Proposal RFP responses and client pitches and drive business development by proactively seeking new opportunities in client accounts

·       Formulate and present Infosys propositions and service offerings, contribute to FSI thought leadership, intellectual property, methods & tools.

·       Play an advisory role to client leaders and Provide direction and guidance on the development of the team, consultants.

**The Successful Candidate will demonstrate the following Strengths:**

·       Extensive experience working in Financial Services with an understanding of customer journeys, process flows, business value realization.

·       Strong communication, listening, influencing and inter-personal skills.

·       Creative with a curious mind, analytical and problem-solving skills.

·       Advanced planning and organizational skills.

·       Demonstrated success in leading and delivering complex programmes in business and technology.

·       Demonstrated creating and embedding a positive and creative environment for our people to thrive.

·       Ability to engage with CxO and senior client stakeholders

·       Ability and willingness to travel as needed for client engagements.

·       Ability to navigate ambiguity and work in a self-directed nature.

·       Good understanding of latest leading technologies, data, AI, digital and able to identify opportunities to incorporate them.

·       Strategic thinker and value driven.

·       Strong delivery focus mindset.

**Qualifications:**

·       Bachelor's or master's degree in STEM or a related field. MBA is preferred. Additional certifications (e.g., PMP, Agile/Scrum)

·       Approx 10-15+ years of experience in a technology-focused role within management consulting, with substantial experience in the Financial Services & insurance industry.

**What We Offer:**

·       The opportunity to work at the forefront of Financial Services & Insurance industry transformation with a leading global consulting firm.

·       Exposure to a variety of challenging and high-profile projects.

·       A collaborative, inclusive, and dynamic work environment.

·       Competitive salary and benefits package, including performance bonuses and career advancement opportunities.

·       Ongoing professional development and training in the latest industry trends and consulting methodologies.

**Other Key Requirements:**

- A good understanding of industry drivers, regulations, challenges, and market trends financial services General financial management skills, financial analysis, gained within both commercial and/or not-for-profit organisations.
- Innovation in both sales and delivery.
- Proven ability to shape propositions and projects that deliver effective business outcomes for clients whilst managing internal commercial and delivery risk.
- Excellent people management and leadership experience, with a proven ability to motivate and lead multi-disciplinary team.

**Why Join Us?**

For the right talent that want to be part of a diverse team, innovation-driven practice and a high-performance culture, we offer industry-leading compensation and benefits, along with top training and development opportunities so that you can grow your career and achieve your personal ambitions. Curious to learn more? We'd love to hear from you.... Join us today!

data.description:
**In the assigned Job Role of Technology Consultant 2, your Area Of Responsibility will be as below:**  

- Contribute to the requirements elicitation process by documenting assigned parts of business requirements, in line with guidance provided
- Facilitate software application design discussions, and document design decisions to guide the technical team towards building software solutions
- Participate in coding and integrate new features or updates into existing applications, with a focus on maintaining system stability
- Conduct code reviews, do changes to the codebase and maintain code repositories
- Implement test strategies, analyse results, and coordinate bug fixes to uphold the software quality standards
- Develop user training programs, documentation, and support frameworks to ensure a smooth transition to new software applications
- Actively participate in resolving production issues and recommend preventive strategies to enhance system reliability
- Maintain detailed records of code, testing techniques, and support activities to enrich the knowledge base and assist other similar projects

  
**Your contribution to the team:**  

- A collaborative spirit and excellent communication skills.
- The ability to handle end to end SDLC phases from requirement gathering to implementation.
- A knack for translating complex requirements into actionable development tasks.
- A passion for design and hands-on coding experience
- A proactive approach to testing, troubleshooting, and refining our applications.
- The ability to work with cross-functional teams and do software integration.

data.description:
**About the Job:**

Join our dynamic team as a Performance Test Engineer, where your expertise will drive the quality and efficiency of our software solutions. In this role, you'll be instrumental in ensuring our applications meet high standards of performance, scalability, and reliability. You'll collaborate with talented engineers, fostering a culture of innovation and continuous improvement. If you're passionate about testing and thrive in a collaborative environment, this is the perfect opportunity to make a significant impact.

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Design and execute performance test plans using Load Runner and JMeter.
- Analyze test results to identify performance bottlenecks and provide actionable insights.
- Collaborate with development teams to integrate performance testing into the software development lifecycle.
- Utilize Dynatrace for monitoring and diagnostics to ensure optimal application performance.
- Prepare detailed reports and documentation of test findings and recommendations.

**Minimum Qualifications:**

- BTech, BCA, B.E, or BSc degree in Computer Science or a related field.
- 3-9 years of experience in performance testing with proficiency in Load Runner and JMeter.
- Strong analytical skills to interpret test results and identify performance issues.

**Preferred Qualifications:**

- Experience with Dynatrace for application performance monitoring.
- Proven track record of successful performance testing in complex software environments.
- Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams to enhance application performance.
- Excellent communication skills to articulate testing results and recommendations.

data.description:
**About the Job:**

Step into a dynamic environment where your expertise as an ETL Test Engineer can truly shine. In this role, you will be at the heart of ensuring the quality and reliability of data systems that drive business decisions. Collaborate with a talented team of professionals who are committed to innovation and excellence. Your contributions will play a vital part in creating efficient data solutions, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and teamwork. This is your opportunity to grow and make a significant impact!

**Key Responsibilities:**

- Design, develop, and execute ETL test plans to ensure data integrity and performance.
- Collaborate with developers and data analysts to understand requirements and design test cases.
- Conduct thorough testing of data warehouse solutions to ensure high-quality deliverables.
- Identify, document, and track defects, ensuring timely resolution.
- Continuously improve testing processes and methodologies to enhance efficiency.

**Minimum Qualifications:**

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field (BTech, BCA, B.E, BSc).
- Proven experience in ETL and Data Warehouse testing (3-9 years).
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

**Preferred Qualifications:**

- Experience with advanced testing methodologies and tools.
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.
- Proven track record in developing automated testing frameworks.
- Strong understanding of data warehouse architecture and ETL processes.
- Excellent communication skills and attention to detail.

data.description:
Infosys is seeking an **Azure DevOps Technology Analyst.** As a Technology Analyst, you will be responsible for Azure infra provisioning, cloud monitoring, alerting, logging, CICD. Candidate should have ability to overseeing cloud migration, and creating systems for managing, monitoring, and maintaining the cloud system. Additionally, translate business needs into robust, scalable cloud solutions while ensuring security, scalability, and compliance. .

**Required Qualifications:**

- Candidate must be located within commuting distance of **Mississauga**/**Toronto, Ontario or be willing to relocate to the area**. This position may require travel.
- Bachelor’s degree or foreign equivalent required from an accredited institution. Will also consider three years of progressive experience in the specialty in lieu of every year of education.
- At least 4 years of Information Technology experience.
- Candidates authorized to work for any employer in Canada without employer-based visa sponsorship are welcome to apply. Infosys is unable to provide immigration sponsorship for this role at this time.

**Preferred Qualifications:**

- At least 3years in Information Technology with experience in Appservices, Aks, Cosmosdb, Cognitive search, Open AI, APIM Technologies.
- At least 3 years’ experience in Azure infra, monitoring, CICD.
- Strong client communication, analytical and team management skills.
- Good experience in the global delivery model.
- Complete Azure Infrastructure knowledge.
- Experience with CI-CD automation and deployment.
- Excellent knowledge around monitoring, alerting and logging.
- Experience in working with Helm & Linux system Fundamentals.
- Experience in Cloud infrastructure management.

**The job entails sitting as well as working at a computer for extended periods of time. Should be able to communicate by telephone, email, or face to face. Extensive travel may be required as per client and project needs.**  
  
Estimated annual compensation range for the candidate based in the below location will be:  
**Ontario:** $ 72783 to $ 105007

data.description:
**About Us**
Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting
*.*
We enable clients in more than 56 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower businesses with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer satisfaction. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovative ecosystem.
  
  
Recognized as the #1 Top Employerin Australia for the second year in a row, Infosys offers a workplace where careers grow with purpose. As an AI‑first organization, we empower our people to work on next‑generation technologies, continuously learn, and create impact at scale—supported by a culture rooted in care, inclusion, and excellence.
  
  
▶️ Join Infosys and be part of a culture that’s not just promised—it’s certified. #TopEmployer2026 #ThriveAtInfosys
  
  
Visit
  
  
**Location: Sydney , Australia.
  
  
Salary: AUD 150742 - 171215 Annual Gross**
**Please Note:**
The above salary range is only indicative and maybe subject to suitable enhancements, based on internal company processes.
  
  
Flexible working arrangements (hybrid, reviewed case-by-case basis). Feel free to connect with your recruiter to learn more about how this works in practice.
  
  
**Experience**
12-15 years
  
  
**Role Overview**
We are seeking a highly skilled .NET Architect to design and lead the development of scalable, high-performance enterprise applications using Microsoft technologies. The ideal candidate will be responsible for defining architecture, establishing best practices, and guiding development teams in delivering robust cloud-native and on-premise solutions.
  
  
**Key Responsibilities**
**T**
Architecture & Design
  
  

- Define and implement end-to-end application architecture using Microsoft .NET technologies.
- Design scalable, secure, and high-performance systems (microservices, event-driven, SOA).
- Create architecture diagrams, design documents, and technical roadmaps.
- Select appropriate design patterns, frameworks, and tools.

**Technology Leadership**

- Provide technical leadership and mentoring to development teams.
- Establish coding standards, governance, and best practices.
- Conduct design reviews and code reviews.
- Drive modernization initiatives (legacy to cloud, monolith to microservices).

**Development & Integration**
Guide development using: ASP.NET Core, .NET 6/7/8+, Web APIs, RESTful services
  
  
Design and implement API-first architectures.
  
  
Ensure system integrations using: Messaging (Azure Service Bus, Kafka, RabbitMQ) & Third-party services & APIs
  
  
**Data & Security**

- Design efficient data models and database strategies:
- SQL Server, Cosmos DB, NoSQL
- Implement security best practices:
- OAuth2, OpenID Connect, IdentityServer

**Performance & Optimization**

- Perform performance tuning, scalability planning, and load testing.
- Optimize applications for high availability and fault tolerance.

**Stakeholder Collaboration**

- Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, and architects.
- Translate business requirements into technical solutions.
- Provide effort estimation and technical feasibility analysis.

**Required Skills & Experience**
Core .NET Expertise
  
  
**Strong Experience In**
C#, .NET Core / .NET Framework
  
  
ASP.NET Core MVC / Web API
  
  
**Deep Understanding Of**
OOP, SOLID principles
  
  
Design patterns (Factory, Repository, CQRS, etc.)
  
  
**Architecture Skills**
Experience with:
  
  
Microservices architecture
  
  
Event-driven systems
  
  
Domain-driven design (DDD)
  
  
Cloud & DevOps
  
  
**Hands-on Experience With**
Microsoft Azure services (App Service, AKS, Functions)
  
  
CI/CD pipelines
  
  
Infrastructure as Code (ARM, Bicep, Terraform)
  
  
Databases
  
  
**Expertise In**
SQL Server / Azure SQL
  
  
NoSQL databases (Cosmos DB, MongoDB
  
  
Strong leadership and mentoring ability
  
  
Excellent communication and stakeholder management
  
  
Problem-solving and analytical thinking
  
  
Decision-making skills for complex technical scenarios.
  
  
**In addition to compensation aligned with your role, you’ll have access to a wide range of benefits that support your health, career growth, and overall well-being (AU)**

- Income Protection Insurance
- Paid Parental and Volunteer leaves
- Employee Assistance Program (EAP)
- Flexible working arrangements (hybrid, reviewed case-by-case basis)
- Health Insurance Discount and Well-being Program
- Access to Fitness and Gym Memberships
- Salary packaging and novated leasing

Our
**recruitment and selection process**
is designed to create the best match for both you and Infosys. Depending on the role, it may include an initial screening, technical or functional interviews, and conversations focused on cultural alignment and shared values. We are committed to making the experience transparent, respectful, and engaging at every step.
  
  
At Infosys, we recognize that everyone has individual requirements. If you are a person with disability, illness, or injury and require adjustments to the recruitment and selection process, please contact our Recruitment team for adjustment either via the following email Infy\_REC\_Helpdesk@infosys.com or call 1-866-472-0935. Alternatively, you can include your preferred method of communication in email, and someone will be in touch.
  
  
Please note in order to protect the interest of all parties involved in the recruitment process, Infosys does not accept any unsolicited resumes from third-party vendors. In the absence of a signed agreement, any submission will be deemed as non-binding and Infosys explicitly reserves the right to pursue and hire the submitted profile. All recruitment activity must be coordinated through the Talent Acquisition department.

company_object.name: Infosys
company_object.long_description:
Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.

Visit www.infosys.com to see how Infosys (NYSE: INFY) can help your enterprise navigate your next.
company_object.seo_description: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting.

data.description:
**About Infosys:**

Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 56+ countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.

Visit
www.infosys.com
to see how Infosys (NYSE: INFY) can help your enterprise navigate your next.

**Short Description:**

If your passion is to build solutions that really make a difference to enterprises, the community and your world, Infosys is the right place for you.

**Roles and Responsibilities:**

- Design, document and implement new systems, as well as enhancements and modifications to existing software with code that complies with design specifications and meets security and Java best practices.
- Interact with both business and technical stakeholders to deliver high quality products and services that meet business requirements and expectations while applying the latest available tools and technology
- Delivering zero defect code and be responsible for ensuring the team's deliverables meet or exceed business expectations

- Effectively communicate status, issues, and risks in a precise and timely manner

**Skills /Competencies:**

Degree/Degree in IT / Computer Science / related discipline.

**4–5 years’ experience of Full Stack Java Development in a containerized microservices architecture using Java/Spring Boot, with strong UI/UX development experience in React.**

Technology Breakdown:

- Microservices & Cloud: Hands-on experience with Kubernetes and AWS.

Backend Development:

- Java EE Framework: Spring Boot

- ORM Framework: Hibernate

- Database: MySQL and/or MongoDB (Open Source)

- Application Server: Spring Boot

- Web Server: JBOSS Web Server

Frontend Development:

- React 18+

- HTML5/CSS (knowledge of web page design is a plus)

Development Tools & Platforms:

- IDEs: VS Code, IntelliJ

- Repository: GitHub

- Issue Tracking: JIRA

- CI/CD: Jenkins

**Preferred skills**

- Strong knowledge of open-source web development tools and modern software engineering practices.
- Cards & payments domain experience

**Additional Skills:**

- Excellent customer interfacing skills.
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
- Strong attention to detail and outstanding analytical and Problem-solving skills.
